cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this question. The question is asking what Lao Yang hoped for with his article. The options are A to D. First, I need to understand the context. Lao Yang has always wanted to be a writer since his school days. He used to write stories and send them to editorial departments, but they never got any responses. Now he works in a factory and still reads a lot. His daughter, Xiao Ping, needed help writing an article for school titled "My Father."
